policy: DRY enforcement ratchet. A duplicated block is a run of identical significant code lines that appears in two or more places. New or changed code must not raise duplicatedLines above the baseline. The baseline is tool-generated (npm run lint:dup -- --update-baseline) and may only ratchet down as duplication is removed. Existing duplication above zero is tracked debt, not approved; see docs/plans/tech-debt-tracker.md.
